title: crataegus oxyacantha f. mediterranea
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha f. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean Hawthorn, is a specific cultivar of the hawthorn plant (Crataegus oxyacantha) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha f. mediterranea include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Crataegus oxyacantha f. mediterranea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular supplement for those looking to support cardiovascular health.
